subcodes.first_line: O thou whom God hath chosen for the promotion of His Cause and the exaltation of His remembrance! That which was written by the pen of love was read, and from its meanings [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من اختاره الله لتبلیغ امره و اعلاء ذکره آنچه مرقوم قلم وداد بود تلاوت شد از معانیش
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
